MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 120 Howard Street, LLC is present. Represented by Greg Meyer
Attorney Todd B. Rothbard appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gourmet Catering, LLC. is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Juliani Pisani, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
